response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics for 'ray' and 'Silhouette'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized reference lyrics for manual transcription and timing alignment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal start times to prevent cascading delays, using instantaneous transitions (Line 1 'e' = Line 2 's') during rapid phrasing in the second song. Included visual text for the transition to 'Silhouette'.

subtitles.original: しょっちゅう唄を歌ったよ
subtitles.english: I always used to sing songs

subtitles.original: その時だけのメロディーを
subtitles.english: With melodies only for that moment

subtitles.original: 寂しくなんかなかったよ
subtitles.english: I wasn't lonely at all

subtitles.original: ちゃんと寂しくなれたから
subtitles.english: Because I was able to properly feel lonely

subtitles.original: いつまで
subtitles.english: Until when

subtitles.original: どこまでなんて
subtitles.english: To where, and such

subtitles.original: 正常か
subtitles.english: Whether it's normal

subtitles.original: 異常かなんて
subtitles.english: Or abnormal

subtitles.original: 考える暇も無い程
subtitles.english: To the point that there's no time to even think

subtitles.original: 歩くのは大変だ
subtitles.english: Walking is such a struggle

subtitles.original: 楽しい方がずっといいよ
subtitles.english: It's much better to have fun

subtitles.original: ごまかして笑っていくよ
subtitles.english: I'll keep on smiling through it all

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ あの痛みは
subtitles.english: It's okay, that pain...

subtitles.original: 忘れたって消えやしない
subtitles.english: ...won't disappear even if I forget it

subtitles.original: 理想で作った道を
subtitles.english: The path I made with ideals

subtitles.original: 現実が塗り替えていくよ
subtitles.english: Reality continues to paint over it

subtitles.original: 思い出はその軌跡の上で
subtitles.english: Memories remain on that trajectory

subtitles.original: 輝きになって残っている
subtitles.english: And stay there as a shining light

subtitles.original: お別れしたのは何で
subtitles.english: Why did we say goodbye?

subtitles.original: 何のためだったんだろうな
subtitles.english: What was it all for, I wonder?

subtitles.original: 悲しい光が僕の影を
subtitles.english: The sad light stretches my shadow

subtitles.original: 前に長く伸ばしている
subtitles.english: Far out in front of me

subtitles.original: 時々熱が出るよ
subtitles.english: Sometimes I get a fever

subtitles.original: 時間がある時眠るよ
subtitles.english: I sleep when I have time

subtitles.original: 夢だと解るその中で
subtitles.english: In the midst of a dream I know is a dream

subtitles.original: 君と会ってからまた行こう
subtitles.english: I'll see you, and then keep going again

subtitles.original: 晴天とはほど遠い
subtitles.english: So far from a clear sky

subtitles.original: 終わらない暗闇にも
subtitles.english: Even in this endless darkness

subtitles.original: 星を思い浮かべたなら
subtitles.english: If I can just imagine the stars

subtitles.original: すぐ銀河の中だ
subtitles.english: I'll be right in the middle of a galaxy

subtitles.original: あまり泣かなくなっても
subtitles.english: Even if I don't cry as much anymore

subtitles.original: 靴を新しくしても
subtitles.english: Even if I get new shoes

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ あの痛みは
subtitles.english: It's okay, that pain...

subtitles.original: 忘れたって消えやしない
subtitles.english: ...won't disappear even if I forget it

subtitles.original: 伝えたかった事が
subtitles.english: Things I wanted to tell you...

subtitles.original: きっとあったんだろうな
subtitles.english: ...must have surely existed

subtitles.original: 恐らくありきたり
subtitles.english: They were probably just ordinary

subtitles.original: なんだろうけど こんなにも
subtitles.english: ...but even so, they mean this much

subtitles.original: お別れした事は
subtitles.english: The fact that we said goodbye

subtitles.original: 出会った事と繋がっている
subtitles.english: Is connected to the fact that we met

subtitles.original: あの透明な彗星は
subtitles.english: That transparent comet

subtitles.original: 透明だから無くならない
subtitles.english: Won't disappear because it's transparent

subtitles.original: ◯×△どれかなんて
subtitles.english: Whether it's a circle, cross, or triangle

subtitles.original: 皆と比べてどうかなんて
subtitles.english: How it compares to everyone else

subtitles.original: 確かめる間も無い程
subtitles.english: To the point that there's no time to verify

subtitles.original: 生きるのは最高だ
subtitles.english: Living is the best thing there is

subtitles.original: あまり泣かなくなっても
subtitles.english: Even if I don't cry as much anymore

subtitles.original: ごまかして笑っていくよ
subtitles.english: I'll keep on smiling through it all

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ あの痛みは
subtitles.english: It's okay, that pain...

subtitles.original: 忘れたって消えやしない
subtitles.english: ...won't disappear even if I forget it

subtitles.original: 大丈夫だ
subtitles.english: It's okay

subtitles.original: この光の始まりには
subtitles.english: At the beginning of this light...

subtitles.original: 君がいる
subtitles.english: ...you are there

subtitles.original: シルエット
subtitles.english: [Title: Silhouette]

subtitles.original: いっせーのーせで
subtitles.english: Ready, set, go

subtitles.original: 踏み込むゴーライン
subtitles.english: Step over the goal line

subtitles.original: 僕らは何も何もまだ知らぬ
subtitles.english: We don't know, don't know anything yet

subtitles.original: 一線越えて
subtitles.english: Crossing the line

subtitles.original: 振り返るともうない
subtitles.english: Looking back, it's already gone

subtitles.original: 僕らは何も何もまだ知らぬ
subtitles.english: We don't know, don't know anything yet

subtitles.original: うだってうだってうだってく
subtitles.english: Dazzled, dazzled, we're dazzled

subtitles.original: 煌めく汗がこぼれるのさ
subtitles.english: Glistening sweat trickles down

subtitles.original: 覚えてないこともたくさんあっただろう
subtitles.english: There must have been many things we've forgotten
